---
title: "Folio"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

A personal reading log — papers and articles, one at a time.

## Registry

```{python}
#| echo: false
from IPython.display import HTML
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("registry.csv")
df["title"] = '<a href="' + df["file"] + '">' + df["title"] + "</a>"
df["pdf"] = '<a href="' + df["pdf"] + '">PDF</a>'
df = df[["index", "title", "category", "year", "pdf"]]
df.columns = ["Index", "Title", "Category", "Year", "PDF"]
HTML(df.to_html(escape=False, index=False))
```

Each entry is a numbered note: what the paper is about, what stood out, and what it connects to. No summaries for the sake of it — only the parts worth keeping.

Entries are grouped by type: **Article** for original research, **Review** for overviews and meta-analyses.
